page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn2.large is a general-purpose virtual server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 4 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs based on the Intel Xeon 8269CY processor, running at a clock speed of 2.5 GHz. The hardware configuration includes 4 physical cores with 1 thread per core, 16.0 GB of system memory providing 4.0 GB per core, and a baseline network bandwidth of 1 Gbps. This instance does not include bundled local storage or GPU accelerators.

Benchmark evaluations place the performance of this instance in the lower tiers. The stress-ng single-core and multi-core CPU tests both rank in the bottom 25%, reflecting its older processor architecture. Memory bandwidth tests show a read-only small block cached speed of 164.0 GB/sec, which drops to 21.24 GB/sec for uncached large blocks. Cryptographic and compression workloads also show limited throughput, with gzip single-threaded compression performing in the bottom 10% at 19.06 GB/sec and bzip3 multi-threaded decompression in the bottom 10% at 14.61 GB/sec.

Given its dedicated CPU allocation and balanced 1:4 memory-to-vCPU ratio, the ecs.sn2.large offers a predictable but modest resource profile. It is qualitatively positioned as a budget-friendly option for legacy general-purpose workloads, light database operations, and basic web serving that do not demand high-throughput memory or advanced vector processing. It is suitable for development environments, low-traffic applications, and utility services where cost efficiency is prioritized over high-performance execution.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn2.large is a general-purpose virtual server instance configured with 4 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs and 16.0 GB of system memory. Powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at 2.5 GHz under the KVM hypervisor, this instance provides a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio but lacks local storage and GPU hardware. Benchmark results indicate modest performance, with CPU and memory bandwidth tests consistently placing in the bottom 25% or lower. Specifically, uncached large-block memory read speeds reach 21.24 GB/sec, and static web serving throughput is limited to 2.44 GB/sec. Given these performance characteristics, the ecs.sn2.large is best suited for low-traffic web serving, basic database operations, and development environments where predictable dedicated CPU resources are required without the need for high-throughput computing.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn2.large is a general-purpose virtual server featuring 4 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 16 GB RAM, and 1 Gbps network bandwidth, suitable for basic workloads and development.
